domain_description: Soundwave is a music streaming platform database. It tracks artists, albums, tracks, users, playlists, subscriptions, play events, and payments.

glossary.is_prim: is primary artist on a track (1=yes, 0=no)

source_of_truth.monthly_listeners_cached: daily_artist_metrics (pre-aggregated — use for reports, not real-time)
source_of_truth.total_plays: tracks.total_plays is a cached counter; use COUNT(play_events) for accuracy
